notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo singles on a line drive to left fielder Ryan Ward. Nolan Arenado to 3rd. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pavin Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Pavin Smith walks. Nolan Arenado scores. Ildemaro Vargas to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Diamondbacks challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Geraldo Perdomo out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Tanner Scott to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pavin Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pavin Smith grounds out, second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
